title: Loom Runtime Policy
description: Security policy configuration for Loom runtime.

allow_all.description: If true, allow all capabilities unless denied by deny_globs.

trust_mode.description: trusted enforces policy; restricted also disables write/move/import/watch operations.

read_paths.description: Allowed root paths for read operations.

write_paths.description: Allowed root paths for write operations.

import_paths.description: Allowed root paths for @import module loading.

deny_globs.description: Glob patterns that deny access even when allowlisted.
